System.ComponentModel;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\nusing System.Linq.Expressions;\nusing System.Reflection;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.HotReload;\n\nnamespace Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Forms;\n\ninternal static class ExpressionMemberAccessor\n{\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<Expression, MemberInfo> _memberInfoCache = new();\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<MemberInfo, string> _displayNameCache = new();\n\n    static ExpressionMemberAccessor()\n    {\n        if (HotReloadManager.Default.MetadataUpdateSupported)\n        {\n            HotReloadManager.Default.OnDeltaApplied += ClearCache;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static MemberInfo GetMemberInfo<TValue>(Expression<Func<TValue>> accessor)\n    {\n        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(accessor);\n\n        return _memberInfoCache.GetOrAdd(accessor, static expr =>\n        {\n            var lambdaExpression = (LambdaExpression)expr;\n            var accessorBody = lambdaExpression.Body;\n\n            if (accessorBody is UnaryExpression unaryExpression\n                && unaryExpression.NodeType == ExpressionType.Convert\n                && unaryExpression.Type == typeof(object))\n            {\n                accessorBody = unaryExpression.Operand;\n            }\n\n            if (accessorBody is not MemberExpression memberExpression)\n            {\n                throw new ArgumentException(\n                    $\"The provided expression contains a {accessorBody.GetType().Name} which is not supported. \" +\n                    $\"Only simple member accessors (fields, properties) of an object are supported.\");\n            }\n\n            return memberExpression.Member;\n        });\n    }\n\n    public static string GetDisplayName(MemberInfo member)\n    {\n        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(member);\n\n        return _displayNameCache.GetOrAdd(member, static m =>\n        {\n            var displayNameAttribute = m.GetCustomAttribute<DisplayNameAttribute>();\n            if (displayNameAttribute?.DisplayName is not null)\n            {\n                return displayNameAttribute.DisplayName;\n            }\n\n            var displayAttribute = m.GetCustomAttribute<DisplayAttribute>();\n            if (displayAttribute is not null)\n            {\n                var name = displayAttribute.GetName();\n                if (name is not null)\n                {\n                    return name;\n                }\n            }\n\n            return m.Name;\n        });\n    }\n\n    public static string GetDisplayName<TValue>(Expression<Func<TValue>> accessor)\n    {\n        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(accessor);\n        var member = GetMemberInfo(accessor);\n        return GetDisplayName(member);\n    }\n\n    private static void ClearCache()\n    {\n        _memberInfoCache.Clear();\n    }\n}\n","numLines":91,"startLine":1,"totalLines":91}}}

For { get; set; }\n    /// <inheritdoc />\n    void IComponent.Attach(RenderHandle renderHandle)\n    {\n        _renderHandle = renderHandle;\n    }\n\n    /// <inheritdoc />\n    Task IComponent.SetParametersAsync(ParameterView parameters)\n    {\n        parameters.SetParameterProperties(this);\n\n        var newDisplayName = ExpressionMemberAccessor.GetDisplayName(For);\n        _displayName = newDisplayName;\n        _renderHandle.Render(BuildRenderTree);\n\n        return Task.CompletedTask;\n    }\n\n    private void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)\n    {\n        builder.AddContent(0, _displayName);\n    }\n}\n","numLines":51,"startLine":1,"totalLines":51}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01AP8gGVxDZs3U3WUZmzHFSa","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Good! I've created the review.json file with three defects:\n\n1. **Missing render optimization (high severity)**: The DisplayName component always re-renders without checking if the `For` parameter changed, violating Blazor component conventions. The fix uses the unused `_previousFieldAccessor` field to track the previous value and only re-renders when it changes.\n\n2. **Incomplete hot reload cache invalidation (critical severity)**: The ClearCache() method only clears _memberInfoCache but not _displayNameCache. This means stale display names persist after hot reload updates.\n\n3. **Incorrect attribute precedence (high severity)**: The code checks [DisplayName] before [Display], but the documentation indicates [Display] should be checked first. Display is the newer, more comprehensive attribute.\n\nEach defect includes:\n- File path\n- Line number\n- Severity level\n- Description of the issue and its impact\n- Unified diff showing the fix\n\nThe patches are properly formatted unified diffs that can be applied to fix the issues.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1603,"cache_read_input_tokens":37723,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1603},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0bb0cbcc-e56d-4086-9512-b67027a0ff44","uuid":"09e4a629-d708-4ad4-aa9b-f5933b236cf1"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01AP8gGVxDZs3U3WUZmzHFSa","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"I've completed the code review and created a structured report at `/workspace/review.json`. Here's a summary of the three defects found:\n\n## Defects Identified\n\n### 1. **Missing Render Optimization** (DisplayName.cs, line 39) — Severity: HIGH\nThe component always re-renders on every `SetParametersAsync` call without checking if the `For` parameter changed. This violates Blazor component conventions for render optimization. The unused `_previousFieldAccessor` field (line 20) was clearly intended for this optimization but was never implemented.\n\n**Fix**: Check if `For` has changed before re-computing and re-rendering, following the pattern used in ValidationMessage.cs.\n\n### 2. **Incomplete Hot Reload Cache Invalidation** (ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs, line 88) — Severity: CRITICAL\nThe `ClearCache()` method clears `_memberInfoCache` but not `_displayNameCache`. When hot reload applies metadata updates, cached display names become stale, causing the component to show outdated information even after attributes change during development.\n\n**Fix**: Clear both caches in the `ClearCache()` method.\n\n### 3. **Incorrect Attribute Precedence** (ExpressionMemberAccessor.cs, line 59) — Severity: HIGH\nThe code checks `[DisplayName]` before `[Display]`, contradicting the documentation which specifies \"reading from `DisplayAttribute` or `DisplayNameAttribute`\". The `Display` attribute is newer and more comprehensive, so it should take precedence when both are present.\n\n**Fix**: Reorder the checks to evaluate `DisplayAttribute` first, then fall back to `DisplayNameAttribute`.\n\nAll proposed fixes are provided as unified diffs in the JSON report."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1603,"cache_read_input_tokens":37723,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1603},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0bb0cbcc-e56d-4086-9512-b67027a0ff44","uuid":"b40fe450-eb90-4310-9185-20bc99d36af8"}
